name: Orica Limited
description: Orica Limited is a leading global provider of mining and infrastructure solutions, specializing in the production and supply of commercial explosives, blasting systems, mining chemicals, and digital monitoring technologies. Headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, the company serves customers across more than 100 countries in the mining, quarrying, oil and gas, and construction industries. With a history dating back to 1874, Orica is recognized as the world's largest provider of commercial explosives and a key supplier of sodium cyanide for gold extraction, consistently focusing on safety, innovation, and operational efficiency for its global client base.
